---
title: "get_orderbook"
---

[< Back to Reference](../reference.qmd)

# `get_orderbook()`

Get Market Orderbook

## Usage

```r
get_orderbook(
  ticker,
  depth = 10,
  kalshi_access_token = "KALSHI_API",
  demo = FALSE
)
```

## Arguments

| Argument | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `ticker` | Character. The market ticker. |
| `depth` | Integer. Order book depth (0 or negative for all levels, 1-100 for specific depth). |
| `kalshi_access_token` | Character. Environment variable name for API key. |
| `demo` | Logical. Use demo environment if TRUE. |

## Value

A list with yes and no order book levels.

## Description

Retrieves the current order book for a specific market showing bid depths.

## Examples

```r
## Not run: 
book <- get_orderbook("KXHIGHNY-25FEB08-B54")
book$yes

## End(Not run)
```

## See also

Other markets: 
`get_candlesticks()`,
`get_market()`,
`get_markets()`,
`get_trades()`
